hardening_notes: Sprint is correctly classified and structured. All 9 packages have documented formal STOP conditions; the expected and correct outcome is classification without activation. STOP conditions 2, 3, 4, and 10 will trigger in Phase 4, blocking Phase 5. Cursor's primary deliverable is the audit paper (Phase 8) and updated carry-forward register (Phase 9).
